title: 296 MA Cities Served | Healthcare Cleaning
description: Healthcare facility cleaning in 109 Massachusetts cities. Boston, Cambridge, Worcester, Springfield. 5 rated. Free quote: (978) 307-8107
aiSummary: Dory's Cleaning Services Inc. is a Massachusetts-based commercial healthcare facility cleaning company with more than 22 years of hands-on clinical experience. We serve 109 cities across Massachusetts, providing CDC and OSHA compliant environmental cleaning for medical offices, specialty clinics (cardiology, dental, urgent care, dialysis), ambulatory and outpatient facilities, surgery centers, rehabilitation and nursing facilities, assisted living, and healthcare administrative offices. Founded by Jeneva Thomas, $2,000,000 liability insurance. Services include infection control, ATP testing, terminal cleaning, COVID disinfection, biohazard cleanup, and 24/7 emergency response. Contact: (978) 307-8107 — based in Marlborough, MA 01752.
keywords: healthcare services Massachusetts, healthcare facility cleaning services near me, medical facility environmental cleaning MA, healthcare services, environmental cleaning Massachusetts

Yes. licensed and $2,000,000 liability insurance. Staff certified in Infection Control, Bloodborne Pathogens, and ATP testing.

acceptedAnswer.text: Call (978) 307-8107 or submit our contact form. We respond within 24 hours.

mainHtml:
1. Home
  2. Service Areas

Healthcare Cleaning Services Across Massachusetts

Choose your service below to find professional cleaning in your city. We serve 100+ locations with 5 specialized healthcare services.

296 Cities Served
21+ Years Experience
5 Services Offered
$2M Insurance Coverage

Your Trusted Massachusetts Healthcare Partner

For over 22 years, Dory's Cleaning Services has been the trusted choice for medical offices, clinics, and healthcare facilities throughout Central and Eastern Massachusetts. From Worcester to the MetroWest area, from Newton to Framingham, we've built our reputation on precision sanitation, infection control protocols, and genuine commitment to patient and staff safety.

Our service area spans more than 100 communities across Middlesex, Worcester, and Norfolk counties. Whether you manage a medical office in Wellesley, oversee an assisted living facility in Marlborough, or direct operations at a clinic in Cambridge, we have the environment-specific expertise and flexibility to meet your sanitation needs.

What sets us apart is our commitment to using EPA-registered hospital-grade disinfectants and following CDC/OSHA guidelines for healthcare facility cleaning services. Every member of our team is fully insured (up to $2 million in coverage), background-checked, and trained in infection control protocols that ensure consistent, compliant results every time.

Our Service Coverage Areas

We proudly serve the Greater Boston area, the MetroWest corridor, and communities throughout Worcester County. Our most popular service areas include:

  • MetroWest: Framingham, Natick, Wellesley, Newton, Marlborough, Hudson, Sudbury
  • Worcester Area: Worcester, Shrewsbury, Westborough, Northborough, Grafton
  • Greater Boston: Cambridge, Brookline, Arlington, Lexington, Waltham
  • 495 Corridor: Hopkinton, Milford, Franklin, Holliston, Ashland

Select a service below to find professional cleaning in your city. Each location page includes local pricing, availability, customer testimonials from your neighbors, and a simple online quote request form. We offer Cleaning Assessment for all new customers, and most homes can be scheduled within 48 hours.

Specialty Clinics

Professional cleaning for specialty medical clinics, dermatology offices, and specialized treatment centers. Thorough protocols that meet regulatory requirements.
